title: In Ancient Pits Near Stonehenge, Scientists See Hints of Solstice Ritual
summary_full: British archaeologists may have found the remains of a site where people celebrated the solstice thousands of years ago, a few miles from the famed stone circle.
summary_public: British archaeologists may have found the remains of a site where people celebrated the solstice thousands of years ago, a few miles from the famed stone circle.
